name: Pumpkin-Pecan Spice Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl according to the manufacturer's instructions for the basic bread setting.
3. Transfer the dough to a greased loaf pan and let it rise until doubled in size.
4. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
6. Store leftovers wrapped in aluminum foil or in an airtight container at room temperature.
